notes: The Windows installer and portable ZIP now have a documented Tauri release pipeline.
The website download hub is wired for direct-file release assets and keeps unpublished files clearly disabled.
Source ZIP and TAR.GZ downloads stay available directly from the ForgeBook website experience.

files.name: ForgeBook Windows Installer
files.description: Install ForgeBook with the full desktop setup flow when the GitHub release asset is published.
files.note: Recommended download for most Windows users.

files.name: ForgeBook Portable Build
files.description: Use a portable package when the zipped desktop build is published to the matching GitHub release.
files.note: Useful for testing or manual extraction workflows.

files.name: ForgeBook Source Package ZIP
files.description: Download the current ForgeBook source snapshot directly as a ZIP archive.
files.note: Current repository snapshot from the main branch until a tagged release archive is published.

files.name: ForgeBook Source Package TAR.GZ
files.description: Download the current ForgeBook source snapshot directly as a TAR.GZ archive.
files.note: Current repository snapshot from the main branch until a tagged release archive is published.
